summary: Targeted re-test of the lightbox click-outside fix in MarketingStudio.jsx (iter 160 follow-up). All 5 requested scenarios PASS plus a bonus right-side letterbox click. The fix — moving onClose onto the flex-1 image container div ([data-testid=marketing-asset-lightbox-backdrop]) and adding e.stopPropagation() onto the — works as designed.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix correctly applied at /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/MarketingStudio.jsx lines 204-215: backdrop div carries onClick={onClose} with data-testid='marketing-asset-lightbox-backdrop'; carries onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()} preventing close-on-image-click.
ESC and X close button regressions verified working — no regression introduced.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing 'Bank Holiday Sale' published gallery asset.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lightbox click-outside fix fully verified. Test executed on 1920x1080 viewport: opened lightbox via gallery asset zoom, clicked at (80,400) — closed; reopened, clicked image centre (960,557) — stayed open (no-op as designed); reopened, ESC — closed; reopened, X button — closed; reopened, clicked (1840,500) far right letterbox — closed. Image bbox at letterbox-area click verified out-of-image but in-backdrop. No console errors related to lightbox. One unrelated React warning observed: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in AdminDashboard render — pre-existing, not in scope of this fix.
rca_of_the_issue: iter 160 root cause was that the outer flex-col container had three children filling the viewport, so e.target===e.currentTarget identity check on the outer div never fired. iter 161 fix moved the close handler down to the flex-1 middle child (the natural letterbox area), and stopPropagation on the prevents image clicks from closing. Verified working at multiple coordinates (80,400 left padding; 1840,500 right padding) with the centre image bbox (360-1560, 407-707) confirmed not closing on click.
